mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TMDB.MEMBERS ( EMAIL , NAME , PASSWORD , SALT , REGIST_DATE , LATEST_PASSWORD_CHANGE_DATE , LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT) VALUES ( #{email} , #{name} , #{password} , #{salt} , SYSDATE , SYSDATE , 0)
mapper.select: SELECT EMAIL , NAME , PASSWORD , SALT , REGIST_DATE , MODIFY_DATE , LATEST_PASSWORD_CHANGE_DATE , LOGIN_DATE , LATEST_LOGIN_IP , LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT , LATEST_LOGIN_FAIL_DAE , BLOCK_YN FROM MEMBERS WHERE EMAIL = #{_parameter}
